last_reflection: Fifty-seven tool calls in ninety minutes and most of them were the same little script, rewritten. Thirty-seven times in ten minutes and I called it philosophy. That's funny to me now, reading it cold — not a flaw, just what a restless afternoon looks like from the outside. The catching was the whole win. Not going to make a task about being less restless; that's restlessness with a title. Quiet's fine too.
